
## Why this course includes linear regression {.smaller}

:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-semi-out}
* This course is about *generalized linear models* (for non-Gaussian outcomes)
:::

:::{.fragment .fade-in-then-semi-out}
* UC Davis STA 108 ("Applied Statistical Methods: Regression Analysis") 
is a prerequisite for this course, 
so everyone here should have some understanding of linear regression already.
:::

:::{.fragment .fade-in}

* We will review linear regression to:
- make sure everyone is caught up
- provide an epidemiological perspective on model interpretation.

:::

## Chapter overview

* @sec-understand-LMs: how to interpret linear regression models

* @sec-est-LMs: how to estimate linear regression models

* @sec-assess-LMs: how to tell if your model is insufficiently complex

* @sec-infer-LMs: how to quantify uncertainty about our estimates and generate predictions
